description:
Under `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → Practical backlog summary Tier 1 stable/cache-friendly layout.

Add tests and snapshots that verify semantically unchanged OM content stays byte-stable when possible, and that the single-string fallback preserves the same logical segmentation used by a future multi-message implementation.
title: Add cache-stability regression coverage for OM rendering and segmented fallback layout
